title: Living on the Leading Edge: Clients’ Needs Mean Embracing Technological Change
content:
## Living on the Leading Edge: Clients’ Needs Mean Embracing Technological Change
Vanessa Vidas shares her insights in CCCA Magazine about how legal service providers can better meet clients' needs by embracing emerging technologies.
View Living on the Leading Edge: Clients’ Needs Mean Embracing Technological Change
This article originally appeared in the Fall 2018 edition of CCCA Magazine.
- Vanessa Vidas Chief of Staff to the Senior Leadership Team People.Offices.Singular Toronto
